branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Causal-wave landing / projector / carrier diagnostic; running-envelope context

description: Boundary-projector-support variation scan for the bounded-operator readout. Each projector Pi_bullet is shifted at its lattice boundary by +/-1, +/-2, +/-3 nodes and the readout coefficients are recomputed; the maximum drift on each carrier coefficient is reported.
drift_verdict: Boundary-shift drift bounded by 1e-4 on every coefficient. Combined with the Richardson residual <= 5e-4, the inferred per-coefficient uncertainty is sigma_c <= 5e-4 reported in (P5) of Section coefficients-provenance.
